news.headline: Deaths in US immigration custody must be investigated: UN rights chief
news.summary: UN High Commissioner for Human Rights Volker Türk on Friday called for stronger independent oversight of the United States immigration detention system and investigations into all deaths in US Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) custody.

news.headline: Venezuela earthquakes LIVE: Death toll rises amid recovery and rescue efforts
news.summary: Nearly seven million Venezuelans could be affected by this week’s double earthquakes as the death toll rises to at least 235 people amid massive, growing needs and ongoing emergency search and rescue efforts, UN agencies reported on Friday. We’re bringing you the latest news live, and UN News app us

news.headline: Venezuela quake: ‘People still terrified to re-enter what were their homes’
news.summary: Aid agencies on Friday highlighted massive needs across Venezuela caused by a double earthquake disaster that has killed at least 235 people so far, with search and rescue for people trapped under the rubble still the top priority.
